hero.badge: Introducing Apsara Elearning — every subject, powered by AI
hero.titleKh: រៀនគ្រប់មុខវិជ្ជា
hero.subtitle: The AI-powered learning platform for Cambodian students — from Grade 1 to university. Master Math, Physics, English and more with <mentor>Apsara Elearning</mentor> — your personal AI tutor that speaks Khmer.

features.subheading: K–12 curriculum, university programs, and a personal AI tutor — all in one platform.

aiMentor.title: Apsara AI Tutor
aiMentor.desc: Step-by-step explanations, instant feedback on exercises, and a personalised study plan — powered by advanced AI.

k12.title: Grade 1–12, Every Subject
k12.desc: Math, Physics, Chemistry, Khmer, English and more — aligned with the national curriculum, with auto-graded practice.

university.title: University Programs
university.desc: Courses organised by faculty and major, from computer science to business — study alongside your degree.

khmerFirst.title: Khmer-First Learning
khmerFirst.desc: Every lesson, explanation, and AI answer available in Khmer. Learn in the language you think in.

certificates.title: Industry Certificates
certificates.desc: Earn recognised certificates upon course completion. Showcase your skills to employers across Cambodia.

courses.pageSubtitle: Browse our curriculum and learn at your own pace.

math.title: Grade 12 Mathematics
math.titleKh: គណិតវិទ្យា ថ្នាក់ទី១២
math.desc: Functions, calculus, and probability — fully aligned with the BacII national exam.

physics.title: Grade 11 Physics
physics.titleKh: រូបវិទ្យា ថ្នាក់ទី១១
physics.desc: Forces, energy, electricity and waves — explained step by step with interactive exercises.

english.title: General English
english.titleKh: ភាសាអង់គ្លេសទូទៅ
english.desc: Build vocabulary, grammar, and conversation skills from beginner to advanced.

python.title: Python Fundamentals
python.titleKh: មូលដ្ឋានគ្រឹះ Python
python.desc: Learn Python from scratch — variables, loops, functions, and object-oriented programming.

react.title: Web Dev with React
react.titleKh: បង្កើតគេហទំព័រ React
react.desc: Build modern web applications with React components, hooks, and state management.

algorithms.title: Algorithms & DSA
algorithms.titleKh: ក្បួនដោះស្រាយ & DSA
algorithms.desc: Master data structures and algorithms — arrays, trees, sorting, and dynamic programming.

howItWorks.subheading: Three simple steps to start learning

choosePath.title: Choose Your Path
choosePath.desc: Pick your grade and subject — or your faculty and major at university level.

learnPractice.title: Learn & Practice
learnPractice.desc: Watch lessons and solve auto-graded exercises while Apsara explains every concept in Khmer.

earnGrow.title: Track & Achieve
earnGrow.desc: Follow your progress, earn certificates, and walk into national exams with confidence.

sokha.name: Sokha Phan
sokha.text: Apsara Elearning helped me prepare for the BacII exam. The Khmer explanations finally made calculus click.

dara.name: Dara Chheng
dara.text: Finally a platform that teaches in Khmer! The AI tutor answers my questions better than any textbook.

bopha.name: Bopha Meas
bopha.text: My students stay motivated with the XP system. Their exam results improved in just two months.

cta.subheading: Join 12,000+ Cambodian students learning smarter — from primary school to university.
cta.finePrint: No credit card required • Always free for students

footer.brand: Cambodia's AI-powered learning platform — every subject from Grade 1 to university. Empowering the next generation of Khmer learners.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Apsara Elearning. Built with ❤️ in Phnom Penh, Cambodia 🇰🇭
